back view with garden,.jpg.title: Spacious Private Rear Garden
back view with garden,.jpg.description: A well-maintained rear garden featuring a generous lawn, paved patio seating area, and secure fenced boundaries, providing residents with a safe and pleasant outdoor space to relax and enjoy fresh air.

Bright and Clean Corridor.jpg.title: Bright Hallway and Staircase
Bright and Clean Corridor.jpg.description: A welcoming entrance hallway featuring a carpeted staircase with white banister, modern grey wood-effect flooring, and colourful artwork leading through to the communal dining area beyond.

Bright and Clean Resident Room.jpg.title: Bright Double Bedroom
Bright and Clean Resident Room.jpg.description: A spacious double bedroom featuring stylish grey laminate flooring, built-in wardrobe, central heating radiator, and plenty of natural light from the large window with decorative curtains.

Bright Interior Hallway.jpg.title: Bright Communal Landing Area
Bright Interior Hallway.jpg.description: A clean and modern communal landing features grey wood-effect flooring, white panel doors with secure locks, and vibrant waterfall artwork, creating a welcoming shared space between rooms.

Bright Private Bedroom.jpg.title: En-Suite Double Bedroom
Bright Private Bedroom.jpg.description: A bright and comfortable double bedroom featuring snowflake-patterned bedding, decorative floral artwork, and a private en-suite bathroom, finished with warm wood-effect flooring throughout.

bright, modern living room dining area.title: Bright Garden View Lounge
bright, modern living room dining area.description: A spacious and light-filled living room featuring comfortable black leather armchairs, elegant patterned curtains, and large patio doors opening onto a well-maintained private garden.

bright, modern living room dining area..title: Bright Open Living Space
bright, modern living room dining area..description: A spacious and light-filled lounge and dining area with comfortable leather seating, French doors opening onto a well-maintained private garden, and direct access to the modern kitchen beyond.

Clean and Spacious Bedroom.jpg.title: Cosy Double Bedroom
Clean and Spacious Bedroom.jpg.description: A bright and welcoming double bedroom featuring a comfortable bed with decorative bedding, bedside storage, and a stylish mandala canvas, offering residents a peaceful personal space at Bishops House.

Clean Private Room.jpg.title: Comfortable Double Bedroom
Clean Private Room.jpg.description: A bright and welcoming double bedroom featuring stylish grey geometric curtains, warm wood-effect flooring, and cosy furnishings, offering residents a private and relaxing personal space.

Comfortable Private Bedroom.jpg.title: Bright Double Bedroom
Comfortable Private Bedroom.jpg.description: A well-presented double bedroom featuring bold red floral bedding, stylish geometric curtains, and vibrant wall art, creating a warm and inviting personal space.

communal living dining area.jpg.title: Open Plan Living Space
communal living dining area.jpg.description: A bright and spacious open plan living and dining area featuring a large wooden dining table, comfortable leather seating, wall-mounted TV, and French doors opening onto the garden.

Cozy Resident Bedroom.jpg.title: Cosy En-Suite Double Room
Cozy Resident Bedroom.jpg.description: A bright and well-appointed double bedroom featuring built-in wardrobe storage, stylish wood-effect flooring, and a private en-suite bathroom, offering residents both comfort and convenience.

Cozy Supported Living Bedroom.jpg.title: Bright Double Bedroom
Cozy Supported Living Bedroom.jpg.description: A well-presented double bedroom featuring light wood flooring, a white panel radiator, geometric print curtains, and cheerful floral artwork, offering a comfortable and welcoming private space for residents.

front.jpg.title: Bishops House Exterior View
front.jpg.description: A well-maintained semi-detached property in Hayes, Middlesex, featuring a welcoming entrance porch, block-paved driveway, and secure ADT alarm system in a quiet residential setting.

fully accessible bathroom.jpg.title: Accessible Wet Room Bathroom
fully accessible bathroom.jpg.description: A modern, fully accessible wet room featuring a walk-in bath with handheld shower, emergency pull cord, grab rails, heated towel rail, and sleek white fittings throughout.

Fully Equipped Care Home Kitchen.jpg.title: Modern Fully-Equipped Kitchen
Fully Equipped Care Home Kitchen.jpg.description: A bright and spacious kitchen featuring a stainless steel range cooker with extractor hood, Miele dishwasher, ample grey cabinetry, and marble-effect worktops, providing residents with everything they need for independent living.

Modern Care Home Bedroom.jpg.title: En-Suite Double Bedroom
Modern Care Home Bedroom.jpg.description: A bright and spacious double bedroom featuring bold red floral bedding, a bay window with decorative curtains, and a private en-suite bathroom with heated towel rail.

Modern Private Room.jpg.title: Bright En-Suite Bedroom
Modern Private Room.jpg.description: A spacious, light-filled double bedroom featuring stylish geometric curtains, modern wood-effect flooring, and direct access to a private en-suite bathroom.

Modern Residential Care Bedroom.jpg.title: En-Suite Bedroom with Storage
Modern Residential Care Bedroom.jpg.description: A bright and comfortable double bedroom featuring a unicorn-themed duvet, pink accent pillows, bedside storage unit, and direct access to a modern private en-suite bathroom with heated towel rail.

Modern Supported Living Bedroom.jpg.title: Bright Double Bedroom
Modern Supported Living Bedroom.jpg.description: A well-presented double bedroom featuring a white fitted wardrobe, stylish geometric curtains, and fresh snowflake-patterned bedding, offering residents a comfortable and welcoming personal space.

Professional Support Office.jpg.title: Dedicated On-Site Office
Professional Support Office.jpg.description: A well-equipped staff office featuring a marble-effect desk, ergonomic seating, computer workstation, printer, and colour-coded filing system, ensuring efficient support and administration for residents at Bishops House.

Spacious Independent Living Kitchen.jpg.title: Modern Fitted Kitchen
Spacious Independent Living Kitchen.jpg.description: A bright and well-equipped kitchen featuring grey gloss units, marble-effect worktops, and a large window overlooking the garden, providing a pleasant and functional space for residents.

Spacious Interior Corridor.jpg.title: Bright Welcoming Hallway
Spacious Interior Corridor.jpg.description: A spacious and light-filled entrance hallway with quality wood-effect flooring leads through to a comfortable dining area, creating a warm and homely first impression at Bishops House.

Well Maintained Bedroom.jpg.title: En-Suite Bedroom
Well Maintained Bedroom.jpg.description: A bright and modern double bedroom featuring fresh blue and white bedding, a colourful floral canvas, and a private en-suite shower room with contemporary fittings.
